raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because Citi has denied my dispute of unauthorized charges totaling {$340.00}, which occurred between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>, on the XXXX platform. These charges were made without my knowledge or consent by my minor child, who used my credit card without authorization. 

As soon as I discovered the activity, I filed a police report with the XXXX Police Department, WA ( Case # : XXXX ), and contacted Citi to dispute the charges through online chat and phone calls. I followed up with a written dispute letter, mailed via certified mail on XX/XX/year>, in full compliance with the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ).

The purchases clearly exhibit compulsive behavior. Many items remain unopened and in my possession. XXXX is a platform that allows fast, high-volume purchases through " live sales '' or " spin-the-wheel '' style games, and my child exploited this format without my knowledge. 

Despite proper documentation and timely reporting, Citi denied my dispute without providing a sufficient explanation. I am requesting that Citi reconsider its decision and issue a refund for these unauthorized transactions. The law is clear that minors can not enter enforceable contracts, and parents should not be held liable when proper reporting and documentation are provided.
